retry_reason: Failure depends on delayed node existence and dirty flag state; these conditions are not transient and retrying the same call will not change them.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to populate struct inode fields from delayed_node's cached inode_item. The reference-count operations (btrfs_get_delayed_node / btrfs_release_delayed_node) are merely incidental bookkeeping to guarantee the delayed_node stays alive during the copy; they do not expose the reference-counted object to the caller.
judge.retry_reason: Failure depends on delayed node existence and dirty flag state; these conditions are not transient and retrying the same call will not change them.
